name: Ambassador Food Services Corp.
summary: Ambassador Food Services Corporation provides contract food services for government social-service agencies and not-for-profit organizations in the New York City area. The company provides this service in the form of managing on-site cafeterias and delivery of meals prepared in the company's central commissary. It also provides basic janitorial services for various food service customers. The company, formerly known as Automatique, Incorporated, was incorporated in 1963 and changed its name to Ambassador Food Services Corporation in 1989. Ambassador Food Services is based in Long Island City, New York.
